allow: Project-local pnpm commands from the agent-quorum repository root are authorized: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm run build, pnpm run types:check, pnpm run lint:check, pnpm run format:check, pnpm run test, pnpm run test:coverage, pnpm run check, pnpm run run:web, pnpm run run:cli, pnpm run run:cli -- plan, pnpm run run:cli -- launch, and pnpm exec <repo-local-bin>.
Read-only git inspection in this repository is authorized: git status, git diff, git show, git log, and git branch --show-current.

Local self-planning dogfood through pnpm run run:cli -- plan (foreground) and pnpm run run:cli -- launch (detached, survives session close) is authorized, along with pnpm run run:cli -- logs / status / show / intervene to observe and steer those runs.
